_meta.dataset: TR-1 2026 scheme N8 'за гружёный рейс' base rate grid (weightT x distance belt) — VERIFIED VERBATIM from sudact
_meta.source: https://sudact.ru/law/prikaz-fas-rossii-ot-06112025-n-89425/prilozhenie-n-1/prilozhenie-n-2/tarify-na-perevozki-gruzov-po_1/ (Тарифная схема N 8, за один вагон, в рублях)
_meta.lookupRule: chargeable weight = max(actual cargo net mass, МВН). For нерудные/щебень МВН ≈ грузоподъёмность (capacity); receipts confirm lookup by CAPACITY rounded to nearest integer ton (cap 69.5/70.3 -> w70; cap 75 -> w75). Rate is PER WAGON (за вагон), не per ton, while mass <= scheme max.
_meta.distanceBeltsNote: non-uniform belts widening with distance; both ends inclusive (distFromKm<=L<=distToKm). Verified identical to the prior fabricated grid for the calibration cells, so the N8 dimension was NOT the source of error — the error was the missing per-model 0.9595 coefficient and the K4 group selection.
